languages.text: "То, что так алчет и чего так страшится Калькасар... что это за предмет?"
"What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"
languages.original_text: "То, что так алчет и чего так страшится Калькасар... что это за предмет?"

traits.locale_text: "What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"
"What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"
"What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"

languages.text: «Lo que Calcazar tanto teme y anhela... ¿Qué es?».
languages.original_text: "What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"

traits.locale_text: «Lo que Calcazar tanto teme y anhela... ¿Qué es?».

languages.text: “卡尔卡扎既垂涎又害怕的东西……到底是什么？”
languages.original_text: "What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"

traits.locale_text: “卡尔卡扎既垂涎又害怕的东西……到底是什么？”

languages.text: « Ce que Calcazar convoite et craint tant... Qu'est-ce donc ? »
languages.original_text: "What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"

traits.locale_text: « Ce que Calcazar convoite et craint tant... Qu'est-ce donc ? »

languages.text: "Calcazar'ın bu kadar arzuladığı ve korktuğu şey... O nedir?"
languages.original_text: "What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"

traits.locale_text: "Calcazar'ın bu kadar arzuladığı ve korktuğu şey... O nedir?"

languages.text: "Was Calcazar so sehr begehrt und fürchtet ... Was ist das?"
languages.original_text: "What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"

traits.locale_text: "Was Calcazar so sehr begehrt und fürchtet ... Was ist das?"

languages.text: カルカザールが渇望し恐れるもの…それは何だ？
languages.original_text: "What Calcazar so covets and fears... What is that?"

traits.locale_text: カルカザールが渇望し恐れるもの…それは何だ？
